original_statement: which season had the most wins?
mutated_statement: which period had the most successes?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Conceptual generalization: "season" → "period" (season→period, specific seasonal/time unit → more general time interval) | "wins" → "successes" (wins→successes, competition-specific result → broader achievement).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据出处：agent 在 judge_thought 明确写道 “Interpreting 'successes' as race victories (wins), we compare the 'win' column...” 并在 iteration 的 simple_query thought 中说明以胜场数为成功指标，最终给出 2011 作为答案。具体表现：一方面识别到术语“successes”可能泛化，主动做出假设（将 successes 解释为 wins）；另一方面没有向用户求证或请求澄清，直接在数据上按该假设计算并返回具体结果。因为 agent 在认识到模糊性的同时选择了基于假设继续推理并给出确定答案，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”类别。
